PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Karen Mitchell for and with Virginia Muzzio. Lawrence Siracusa for Thomas Lucas (Petitioner, Special Administrator and Conservator for Virginia Muzzio).

Ms. Mitchell stated that they were here in support of the petition, that the property was community property and that Ms. Muzzio was the sole beneficiary of the will. Mr. Siracusa stated that a formal probate was not opened and that the proceeds from the sale were in the Special Administrator account. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the written order). Status on filing of the petition for final distribution of the estate was set for February 23, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
